labels.value: Verify if User gets output upon giving valid python code in Editor box after navigating to tryEditor page from Types of Binary Trees page

name: Verify if User gets output upon giving valid python code in Editor box after navigating to tryEditor page from Types of Binary Trees page

steps.name: Given User is in landing page
When User clicks on getStarted button in landing page and SignIn button in Home Page
And User enters valid credentials for login and Clicks Submit in Login Page
Then User should navigate to home Page with title "NumpyNinja"
When User enters valid python code in the textBox "TryEditor" and  0 of Types of Binary Trees page and clicks Run button.
Then User sees the output in the console of try editor from Types of Binary Trees.
